interpretation: Source-audited conditional design-space screening; frequencies are not real-world probabilities
coefficient_scope: Cradle-to-gate material-production proxy; component fabrication and later life-cycle stages are excluded

steel.basis: worldsteel plate anchor with deliberate plus or minus 20 percent stress bounds

concrete.basis: generic concrete proxy with asymmetric high-cement stress

aggregate.basis: ICE general gravel or crushed-rock anchor and published EPD range

cfrp.basis: wide rope-product proxy bracket; published dry rope mass is not a pure-carbon-fibre or standard laminate mass

windcrete_omitted_reinforcement_ratio.basis: explicit omission stress, bounded by the ActiveFloat rebar-to-concrete mass ratio rather than an empirical probability distribution

rating_transfer.statement: Analytic transfer only; not a set of engineered lower-rating designs
